title: Writers and Authors
description: Originate and prepare written material, such as scripts, stories, advertisements, and other material.

tasks.text: Develop advertising campaigns for a wide range of clients, working with an advertising agency's creative director and art director to determine the best way to present advertising information.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Vary language and tone of messages based on product and medium.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Present drafts and ideas to clients.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Discuss with the client the product, advertising themes and methods, and any changes that should be made in advertising copy.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review advertising trends, consumer surveys, and other data regarding marketing of goods and services to determine the best way to promote products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Write articles, bulletins, sales letters, speeches, and other related informative, marketing and promotional material.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct research and interviews to determine which of a product's selling features should be promoted.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Invent names for products and write the slogans that appear on packaging, brochures and other promotional material.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other writers on specific projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct research to obtain factual information and authentic detail, using sources such as newspaper accounts, diaries, and interviews.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult with sales, media and marketing representatives to obtain information on product or service and discuss style and length of advertising written material.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Edit or rewrite existing written material as necessary, and submit written material for approval by supervisor, editor, or publisher.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Follow appropriate procedures to get copyrights for completed work.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan project arrangements or outlines, and organize material accordingly.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare works in appropriate format for publication, and send them to publishers or producers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Revise written material to meet personal standards and to satisfy needs of clients, publishers, directors, or producers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Work with staff to develop script, story, or advertising concepts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write advertising material for use by publication, broadcast, or internet media to promote the sale of goods and services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write fiction or nonfiction prose, such as short stories, novels, biographies, articles, descriptive or critical analyses, and essays.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write to customers in their terms and on their level so that the script, story, or advertisement message is more readily received.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
